name: ns-portal-kit
description: A deployable toolkit of add-ons for the NetSapiens Manager Portal, running on Cloudflare Workers: call-flow diagrams, Ringotel app status, and device enrichment.
//test: test:worker is deliberately NOT in `test`: it needs a real domain snapshot, which is customer data and correctly absent from this repo. Run it by hand: pnpm test:worker <snapshot.json>

scripts.test: pnpm run test:portal && pnpm run test:ringotel && pnpm run test:nsdevices && pnpm run test:access
